description: Empowering women to pursue careers in engineering.
A community for students passionate about computer science, programming, and technology. Join us for hackathons, workshops, and networking events with industry professionals.
Exploring the intersection of technology and ethics. We discuss AI ethics, data privacy, digital rights, and the social impact of emerging technologies.
Bringing together students interested in biomedical engineering, healthcare innovation, and medical device development. Hands-on projects and guest speakers from the industry.
Empowering women to succeed in business through mentorship, professional development, and networking opportunities with successful female executives.
Learn data analysis, machine learning, and statistical modeling. Work on real-world projects and compete in data science competitions.
Engage in thoughtful discussions about moral philosophy, ethics, and the big questions of human existence. Weekly seminars and debates.
Build, program, and compete with robots! Perfect for students interested in mechanical engineering, electrical engineering, and computer science.
Supporting and celebrating women in science, technology, engineering, and mathematics through community building, mentorship, and advocacy.
Addressing environmental challenges through an ethical lens. Discuss sustainability, climate justice, and our responsibilities to future generations.
For math enthusiasts! Explore advanced topics, participate in math competitions, and attend talks by renowned mathematicians.
Developing the next generation of women leaders through workshops, speaker series, and leadership training programs.
